name: Monte Albán
description: Ancient Zapotec capital with panoramic valley views and museum exhibits.

name: Templo de Santo Domingo
description: Baroque church and former convent, now home to the Oaxaca Cultural Museum.

name: Hierve el Agua
description: Petrified waterfall formations and natural infinity pools in the Sierra Madre.

name: Mercado 20 de Noviembre
description: Vibrant market famous for Oaxacan mole, chapulines, and pasillo de humo.

name: Árbol del Tule
address: 2 de Abril, Santa María del Tule, Oaxaca 68297
description: One of the world's widest trees, a sacred Montezuma cypress over 2,000 years old.

name: Zócalo de Oaxaca
address: Plaza de la Constitución, Centro, Oaxaca 68000
description: Historic main square surrounded by cafés, the cathedral, and live marimba music.

name: Museo de las Culturas
address: Gurrión y Macedonio Alcalá, Centro, Oaxaca 68000
description: Treasures from Monte Albán and Mixtec gold, housed in the Ex Convento de Santo Domingo.

name: Mitla
address: Carretera Oaxaca–Mitla km 46, San Pablo Villa de Mitla 70430
description: Mixtec ruins renowned for intricate geometric stone fretwork and columned halls.
